summary: Iteration 122: COMPREHENSIVE REGRESSION TEST after Settings refactor. All 13 main tabs and 5 Settings sub-tabs tested. Login works, all tabs load correctly, Settings sub-tabs switch without page reload, branding sync to header works, keyboard shortcuts work. NO REGRESSIONS FOUND.

minor.issue: Console shows 404 error when loading GST settings (may be expected if no settings saved yet)

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed (pre-existing issue)

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Login flow works (username: admin, password: admin123)
VERIFIED: Entries tab - Table loads with existing entries, Add Entry dialog opens
VERIFIED: Dashboard tab - Shows Rice Stock, Paddy Stock, Mandi Target vs Achieved
VERIFIED: Vouchers (Sale Book) tab - Existing voucher visible with action icons (PDF, WhatsApp, GST Summary)
VERIFIED: Paddy Purchase tab - Table loads with 3 existing records, totals visible
VERIFIED: Cash Book tab - Table loads with cash transactions, balances shown
VERIFIED: Reports tab - CMR vs DC report visible with Milling Output, DC Allotment sections
VERIFIED: Settings > Branding - Company name shows 'NAVKAR AGRO', edit and save works, header updates
VERIFIED: Settings > GST - CGST/SGST/IGST inputs visible, GST Company Details form visible with save button
VERIFIED: Settings > Stock - Opening Stock section shows Paddy=500, Carry Forward button visible
VERIFIED: Settings > Messaging - WhatsApp Connected status shown, Telegram Bot section visible
VERIFIED: Settings > Data - Health Check button works (shows 'Sab theek hai'), Backup section shows 4/7 backups, Error Log section has Refresh/Clear buttons
VERIFIED: Branding update syncs to header - Changed company name, header updated immediately
VERIFIED: Keyboard shortcuts work - Alt+E for Entries, Alt+D for Dashboard, Escape to close dialogs
VERIFIED: Mill Parts tab - Stock Summary with sub-tabs visible
VERIFIED: Staff tab - Attendance with sub-tabs visible
VERIFIED: Hemali tab - Hemali Payments with sub-tabs visible
VERIFIED: FY Summary tab - Shows Cash & Bank, Paddy Stock, FRK Stock, Milling Summary, Byproduct Stock
VERIFIED: DC Payments tab - DC/Delivery Challan section visible
VERIFIED: Payments tab - Truck Payments with data visible
context_for_next_testing_agent: Settings page successfully refactored from App.js into Settings.jsx component. All 13 main tabs work correctly: Entries, Dashboard & Targets, Milling (CMR), DC (Payments), Vouchers, Cash Book & Ledgers, Payments, Reports, Mill Parts, Staff, Hemali, FY Summary, Settings. Settings has 5 sub-tabs: Branding, GST, Stock, Messaging, Data. All state management moved to Settings.jsx except branding which updates App.js via onBrandingUpdate callback. WhatsApp is connected with API key configured. Backup reminder dialog still works from App.js.
